title: Cyient is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cyient is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cyient, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
